metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.3E,F
Shank2 is associated with the PSD
Literal
"labeling is relatively weak in dendrites (d), enhanced toward dendritic spines (sp), and very strong at PSDs (arrowheads, arrows). "
Fig 4
Shank2 is synaptically localized
Literal
"Figure 4A,B illustrates the punctate distribution and close apposition of ProSAP1-immunoreactive structures and the presynaptic cytomatrix protein Bassoon. The virtually complementary localization of ProSAP1 and the synap- tic vesicle protein synaptophysin or Bassoon at mossy fiber bou- tons of the CA3 region can be seen in Figure 4C,D.". Experimental description: Electron microscopy is performed in rat brain's slices
Literal from M&M
"Electron microscopy was performed using vibratome sections (50 m) from rat brains fixed by perfusion with Karnowsky's solution,"
Experiment of immunohistochemistry are made in rat.
Literal from M&M
"Immunocytochemical staining was performed using 7 m microtome sections from rat brains"
